action.thought:
Looking at the current SYsULexer.g4 file, I can see that it's missing many common C language tokens that are needed for proper lexing. Looking at the standard C language tokens and the answer file, I need to add:

1. More operator tokens like minus (-), multiply (*), divide (/), etc.
2. String literals
3. Character literals
4. Comparison operators like <, <=, >, >=, ==, !=
5. Logical operators like &&, ||, !
6. Bitwise operators like &, |, ^, ~, <<, >>
7. Increment/decrement operators like ++, --
8. Assignment operators like +=, -=, *=, /=, etc.
9. Preprocessor directives handling
10. Proper handling of whitespace and newlines

Looking at the answer file, I also need to make sure I'm generating the right mapping names. From the answer file, I can see:
- int 'int' [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:1>
- identifier 'main' [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:5>
- l_paren '(' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:9>
- r_paren ')' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:10>
- l_brace '{' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:11>
- return 'return' [StartOfLine] [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:5>
- numeric_constant '3' [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:12>
- semi ';' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:13>
- r_brace '}' [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:1>
- eof '' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:2>

So I need to:
1. Add missing token types to the g4 file
2. Fix the main.cpp to properly handle file location info
3. Fix the logic for StartOfLine and LeadingSpace detection
